SEARCH
Package org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.utils.compatibility

Class WorldCreatorCompatibility

java.lang.Object
org.mvplugins.multiverse.core.utils.compatibility.WorldCreatorCompatibility
@AvailableSince("5.7") public final class WorldCreatorCompatibility extends Object
Compatibility class used to handle WorldCreator API changes across different server versions.
Since:
5.7

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    canCreateWorldWithKey()
    Check whether the current server version supports creating worlds with a NamespacedKey.

    Tries to set bonus chest if the server implements the API.

  • Method Details

    • canCreateWorldWithKey

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static boolean canCreateWorldWithKey()
      Check whether the current server version supports creating worlds with a NamespacedKey.
      This is based on whether the ofKey(NamespacedKey) method exists in the WorldCreator class, which was introduced in later server versions.
      Returns:
      True if the server supports world creation with NamespacedKey, else false.
      Since:
      5.7

    • ofKeyOrName

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static org.bukkit.WorldCreator ofKeyOrName(@NotNull @NotNull WorldKeyOrName keyOrName)
      Creates a WorldCreator from a WorldKeyOrName, using the most appropriate method based on the server version and the key/name state.
      If the server supports NamespacedKey-based creation and the provided keyOrName is a key, this method will use ofKey(). Otherwise, it falls back to name().
      Parameters:
      keyOrName - Either a world key or name to create from.
      Returns:
      The WorldCreator initialized for the given key or name.
      Since:
      5.7

    • ofNameAndKey

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static org.bukkit.WorldCreator ofNameAndKey(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.NamespacedKey worldKey, String worldName)
      Creates a WorldCreator from a NamespacedKey and world name, using the most appropriate method based on the server version and dimension storage configuration.
      This method attempts to use the most feature-rich creation method available: if ofNameAndKey() is available and the parameters are compatible, use it; otherwise, if ofKey() is available, use it; as a fallback, use name().
      Parameters:
      worldKey - The namespaced key for the world.
      worldName - The display name for the world.
      Returns:
      The WorldCreator initialized with the given key and name.
      Since:
      5.7

    • supportsForcedSpawnPosition

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static boolean supportsForcedSpawnPosition()
      Checks if the server supports configuring a forced spawn position via the WorldCreator API.
      The force spawn position API is generally only available on PaperMC 26.1+
      Returns:
      Whether force spawn position API is supported on the current server version.
      Since:
      5.7

    • setForcedSpawnPosition

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static void setForcedSpawnPosition(org.bukkit.WorldCreator worldCreator, EntityPosition position)
      Tries to set the forced spawn position if the server implements the API. This call will do nothing if server software does not implement the required APIs.
      Parameters:
      worldCreator - Target creator instance to set on.
      position - The position to set as the forced spawn point for the world.
      Since:
      5.7

    • supportsBonusChest

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static boolean supportsBonusChest()
      Checks if the server supports configuring bonus chest generation via the WorldCreator API.
      The bonus chest API is generally only available on PaperMC 1.21.5+
      Returns:
      Whether bonus chest API is supported on the current server version.
      Since:
      5.7

    • setBonusChest

      @AvailableSince("5.7") public static void setBonusChest(org.bukkit.WorldCreator worldCreator, boolean generateBonusChest)
      Tries to set bonus chest if the server implements the API. This call will do nothing if server software does not implement the required APIs.
      Parameters:
      worldCreator - Target creator instance to set on.
      generateBonusChest - Whether to generate a bonus chest at the world spawn point.
      Since:
      5.7
